character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style). 
STRICT FRONT-FACING POSE for 8-direction rotation.

POSE:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite, body squared toward viewer
- Slightly hunched broad-shouldered stance
- Massive arms held forward and out, ready to charge
- Both shoulders parallel, head straight forward
- Both feet planted wide

PROPORTIONS:
- Large hulking humanoid (~1.5x player size)
- Very broad shoulders, massive arms (longer than typical)
- Slightly hunched, ~6-head ratio with broad torso
- Stocky muscular build

FACE — BRUTE MINIMALIST:
- Two GLOWING DIM ORANGE EYES (pinpricks set in stone-skin face)
- NO mouth, NO nose — face is gray-brown stone-like skin
- Sharp brow ridges with 2-3 dark pixel definition above eyes

HAIR:
- No traditional hair, but rough rocky scalp with cracks

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- Thick GRAY-BROWN STONE-LIKE SKIN with deep cracks revealing 
  DIM ORANGE MAGMA underneath (chest, shoulders, arms)
- Tattered loincloth and dark leather wraps around the waist 
  (no proper armor)
- Wielding a CRUDE JAGGED STONE OR RUSTED IRON CLUB in the 
  RIGHT HAND at the right side, club head pointing slightly 
  upward (NOT touching ground)
- Left arm hangs heavy at the side
- Bare massive feet with stone-like texture

COLOR PALETTE:
- Dim orange magma cracks and eye glow are the saturated accents
- Limited palette ~16 colors of gray-brown stone, charcoal, 
  dim orange magma, weathered iron

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ Magma cracks are deliberate clean pixel patterns (not random)
★ NO random white specks, NO sparkles
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow on the ground
